summary: There is no established link between over-the-counter pharmacy syringe sales and crime; while syringes may be occasionally misused in drug injections, such cases remain isolated and not tied to widespread criminal activities. The primary regulation focuses on preventing syringe diversion for illegal drug manufacturing, not general criminality.
